t_ch: 我似乎不行。
t_en: I don't seem to be cut out for this.

t_ch: 没关系，这也是常有的事，说明你更适合当一名战士。
t_en: That's okay, there are many others like you. It just means you're meant to be a warrior!

t_ch: 说起来，你们和阿雅聊过了吧，感觉如何？
t_en: Ooh, you met Agy, right? How did your chat go?

t_ch: 我已经摸清了你们的底细…
t_en: I now know all there is to know about you...

t_ch: 哦？那还真是了不起呀。
t_en: Really? That's pretty impressive!

t_ch: 我和她达成了共识。
t_en: We reached an agreement.

t_ch: 哈哈，一切顺利就好。
t_en: Alrighty, as long as things are going well!

t_ch: 认真地讲，*我们*都觉得两位降临在…咳咳，来到奥赫玛绝非偶然。上手就能和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}共鸣的祭司，缇宝老师也是第一次见。
t_en: You know, we are pretty certain there's more to your sudden... arrival to Okhema. And Tribbie has never seen a priest achieve resonance with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} on their first try.

t_ch: 学会了它，你们在翁法罗斯就能畅行无阻啦。嗯，基本上吧。
t_en: But with this, you should be able to clear any obstacle when traveling around Amphoreus... Um, most of the time, at least.

t_ch: 啊对了，差点忘记正事…*我们*来找两位，是想确认你们有没有<color=#dbc291ff>传信石版</color>。没了它，在奥赫玛可是寸步难行。
t_en: Oh, right... We came by to check if you have teleslates with you. It'll be a lot easier to get around Okhema with them.

t_ch: 传信石版…？
t_en: Teleslates...?

t_ch: （掏出手机）该不会是…
t_en: (pull out your phone) Is this...?

t_ch: （掏出手机）你说的是这玩意？
t_en: (pull out your phone) You mean this device?

t_ch: 就是它！果然，天外…两位的城邦也有雅努萨波利斯的祭司嘛！
t_en: Yeah! We knew it, there are also Janusopolis priests beyond the sk — um, beyond Okhema... like the city you're from!

t_ch: 让我看看…外形不太一样，但功能倒是差不多，也许能通过共鸣…嗯……
t_en: Let's see... This looks different, but it works more or less the same. Hmm, maybe a little resonance will do the trick...

t_ch: 大功告成！以后*我们*就能通过石版联络对方啦。不过仅限于奥赫玛城中哦，离开了阿雅编织的金线，传信就不起效果了。
t_en: All set! Now we can contact one another with our teleslates. Only in Okhema though. Messages won't send once you're outside Agy's web of golden threads.

t_ch: 这还真是…令人意外。
t_en: That is... surprising.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，你该不会把*我们*当成什么都不懂的原始人了吧？
t_en: Hah, did you think we were some backwater people who don't understand anything?

t_ch: 两位也可随意使用自己带来的货币，{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的天秤会衡量万物的价值，不用担心身无分文，没法在圣城生活。
t_en: You can also use any currency you have on you. {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton's{RUBY_E#} scales will determine the value of all items, so there's no need to worry about being penniless in the holy city!

t_ch: 不会破坏经济循环吗？
t_en: Won't that mess up the economy?

t_ch: 别担心，就你们二位不会有什么影响。但如果元老会的议员问起…还是要替*我们*保密哦！
t_en: Not if it's just the two of you. But if any of the Council Elders happen to ask... it's our little secret~!

t_ch: 原来不包饮食起居啊。
t_en: Oh, so we have to pay for our own food and accommodation...

t_ch: 哦？原来你一直是这么打算的啊…
t_en: Hmm? Were you expecting otherwise...?

t_ch: 泰坦，真神奇啊…
t_en: Titans are really capable of anything...

t_ch: 是啊。泰坦，很奇妙吧？
t_en: We know, right? Aren't Titans amazing?

t_ch: 那我先去处理别的事啦。回头见哦，祝你们玩得开心。
t_en: Okay, time to get back to work. Have fun exploring the city! We'll see you two later!

t_ch: …不合常理的事，实在太多了。
t_en: ...The list of inexplicable things only gets longer.

t_ch: 看，屋顶上有人。
t_en: Look, someone's on the roof.

t_ch: 那儿的视角似乎不错，能拍到整个城区。我们也找路上去吧。
t_en: That should be a good vantage point to photograph the city. Let's find a way up.

t_ch: 视野极佳，还能望见那尊泰坦，把这一幕记录下来吧。
t_en: An excellent lookout over the city. We can even see that Titan statue. Let's get a photo of this view.

t_ch: ——两位，在做什么呢？
t_en: What are you two doing up here?

t_ch: 二位是守护了圣城的英雄吧，我达米亚诺斯看见了你们英勇的身影。
t_en: I know you. You're the heroes who helped defend our city, right? I, Damionis, saw your valiant figures in the battle.

t_ch: 你好。我们是…来自远方城邦的士兵。
t_en: Nice to meet you. We're... soldiers from a faraway city.

t_ch: 我们初来奥赫玛，希望能留下些纪念，所以来到视野宽阔的地方…嗯，制作…不对，捕捉？总之，想留住这片风景。
t_en: It's our first time in Okhema, so we thought we'd find a nice vantage point to... uh, create...? No, capture...? I mean, to remember this city and its sights by.

t_ch: 喔——你是想说「拍照」吧？
t_en: Oh... You mean to say "take a photo," don't you?

t_ch: 心疼你。
t_en: There, there.

t_ch: （努力憋住嘲笑）
t_en: (Try hard to hold back your laughter)

t_ch: 没错，是这个意思。
t_en: Ahem, yes. I meant to say that.

t_ch: 哈哈！那二位算是找对人了，不才达米亚诺斯，对旅行和留影颇有研究——毕竟我的身份，就是圣城家喻户晓的探险家！
t_en: Aha! You met the right person! The name's Damionis, and I may have some humble insight on travel and photography... After all, everyone in this holy city knows me as the explorer!

t_ch: 来，把你们的<color=#dbc291ff>留影石机</color>交给我吧。
t_en: Alright, pass me your <color=#dbc291ff>photostone</color>.

t_ch: …我也不想再推敲他们给事物命名的规律了。
t_en: ...I'm not even going to bother guessing their logic for naming things.

t_ch: 你将三月七的照相机交给了达米亚诺斯……
t_en: You give March 7th's camera to Damionis...

t_ch: 喔，是没见过的机型，但难不倒我。是这里吧？还有这里…哈！轻轻松松，我已经完全理解了……
t_en: Oh, this is an entirely foreign make. But that's not going to stop me! I'm guessing this here... and that... Hah! Easy-peasy, I know how to use this now.

t_ch: 怎么不说话了？
t_en: What is it? Cat got your tongue?

t_ch: 不是完全搞懂了吗？
t_en: Didn't you say you knew how to use it?

t_ch: …没事！来吧两位，请站好，然后看向我！
t_en: ...It's no biggie! Okay, strike your poses and look this way!

t_ch: 搞定了。给二位过过目！
t_en: And... we're done! Here, have a look!

t_ch: 感觉还不错。
t_en: Not bad.

t_ch: 光圈太小，景深太大。
t_en: A greater aperture and a shallower depth of field would work better.

t_ch: …别挑剔了。
t_en: ...Don't be so nitpicky.

t_ch: 包后期吗？
t_en: Can you also apply some filters?

t_ch: …还是交给三月吧。
t_en: ...Let's leave that to March.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，两位满意就好。
t_en: Heh, as long as you're happy with the photos.

t_ch: 话说回来，其实我有件事想请教二位英雄，没想到正巧遇上，那我可直接问了……
t_en: Say, I've been wanting to ask you guys something. I didn't think I'd actually get the chance but...

t_ch: 你们，其实不是从异邦来的吧？
t_en: You're... You're not really from another city, are you?

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: I don't think I understand your question.

t_ch: 小道消息已经传开了，有刚进城的难民说——你们是来自「天外」的人，是白厄阁下在路边捡到的。
t_en: I've heard some things here and there. Refugees that just came into the city are saying that the people Lord Phainon picked up are from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 「捡到」可还行。
t_en: Pfft, did he really pick us up?

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent)

t_ch: 恐怕要让你失望了，先生，谣言只是谣言。
t_en: Sorry to disappoint you, sir. I'm afraid those rumors are just rumors.

t_ch: 我们来自「塔拉萨波利斯」，一个人烟稀少的边陲村落。为前来圣城，我们经历了重重险阻，有幸在重渊与白厄阁下结识，才抵达这里。
t_en: We're from Thalassopolis, a sparsely populated frontier village. Our journey to the holy city was fraught with challenges but thankfully, we were able to make our way here after meeting Phainon at the Abyss.

t_ch: 塔拉萨波利斯…？
t_en: Thalassopolis...?

t_ch: 唉，这样啊…我还以为终于能证明「天外之界」的存在了呢。
t_en: Oh, is that so... I... I'd thought that I had finally found proof that a world beyond the sky exists.

t_ch: （表达关切）其实……
t_en: (Express concern) Well, actually...

t_ch: …喂，记住「约定」。
t_en: ...Hey, remember the agreement.

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent)

t_ch: 哈哈，无妨！无论如何，感谢你们出手相助，塔拉萨波利斯的战士。
t_en: Haha, it doesn't matter! At any rate, thanks for your help, warriors of Thalassopolis.

t_ch: ——奥赫玛欢迎你们。
t_en: Okhema welcomes you.

t_ch: 好险。有种不好的预感。
t_en: That was close, but I have a bad feeling about this.

t_ch: 挺会编啊，丹恒。
t_en: That was a good story, Dan Heng.

t_ch: 感觉没能骗过他。
t_en: I don't think that we managed to fool him.

t_ch: 感觉没能骗过他…
t_en: I don't think that we managed to fool him...

t_ch: 毕竟「塔拉萨波利斯」只是我临场编造的，如果他真是探险家，又对翁法罗斯的地理了如指掌，恐怕我们早就被看穿了。
t_en: After all, Thalassopolis was something I came up with on the fly. If he's truly an explorer familiar with the geography of Amphoreus, I'm afraid that he'll have already seen through our lies.

t_ch: 所幸没留下什么证据。不过…就算星空在翁法罗斯是一种禁忌，果然还是会有人对它报以憧憬。
t_en: Fortunately, there's no evidence. But... seems like even though the starry sky is taboo on Amphoreus, there are people who still yearn for it.

t_ch: 我们得更小心了。
t_en: Looks like we have to be even more cautious.

t_ch: …昔日的影子，你还没有走出。黄金裔。
t_en: ...Out of the shadow of the past, you've not stepped, Chrysos Heir.

t_ch: 火种之重，若想承受…必须埋葬过去，悬置痛苦。
t_en: The weight of the Coreflame, if you wish to bear... You must bury the past, suspend the pain.

t_ch: 我尽力吧，哈托努斯。你明知我做不到，又何必一直提它呢？
t_en: I'll try my best, Chartonus. But why keep mentioning it if you already know I can't do it?

t_ch: …来了，你的客人。
t_en: ...Here, your guests are.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，丹恒！回来得比想象中快嘛，还以为阿格莱雅会多留你们一会儿。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng! You're back much quicker than I imagined. I thought that Aglaea would keep you for a bit longer.

t_ch: 给，先前说好的「赔偿」。我委托圣城最负盛名的大工匠修好了你的长枪。
t_en: Here you go. This is the compensation I previously mentioned. I asked the most famous Grand Craftsman in the holy city to repair your spear.

t_ch: 初次见面时有所冒犯，再次向两位致歉。
t_en: Once again, let me offer my sincere apologies for any offense I caused during our first meeting.

t_ch: 单从外表完全看不出损坏过的痕迹，厉害。
t_en: Judging solely from its exterior, I cannot see any signs of damage. It's truly incredible.

t_ch: 造出这柄枪的人也是位赫赫有名的工匠吧，天外有天，我完全无法想象一个翁法罗斯之外的世界。
t_en: The one who crafted this spear must also be a renowned master. I guess there's always someone greater out there. Although I still can't imagine a world outside Amphoreus.

t_ch: …也不尽然，或许只是在遇见你们之前，我从来没有认真考虑过这事。
t_en: ...Or perhaps I've just never given it much thought until I met you two.

t_ch: 降临在翁法罗斯的「三相神谕」，还有黄金裔肩负的使命，你们应该已经听说了吧。对于我们，追逐预言就是旅途的目的，思忖太多并无意义。
t_en: You've probably now heard about the tripartite prophecy that descended upon Amphoreus and the mission of the Chrysos Heirs. For us, pursuing the prophecy is the purpose of our journey. Therefore, thinking too much about other things is unnecessary.

t_ch: 没人质疑预言吗？
t_en: Hasn't anyone questioned the prophecy?

t_ch: 神谕又是谁颁布的？
t_en: And who was it exactly that issued the prophecy?

t_ch: 神谕之所以是神谕，正因它是以「奇迹」的形式降临。无人知晓它究竟代表了谁的意志。
t_en: It's considered a prophecy because it manifested as a miracle, though its origin or whose will it represents remains unknown.

t_ch: 也有一种说法，它是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}长眠前的低吟，是天父将自己的神血洒向大地，从此，世间开始诞生黄金裔…当然，这只是诸多民间传说中的一种。
t_en: There's another theory that it is the whispers of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} before their eternal slumber. It was the sky father who scattered their divine blood all over the land that gave rise to the Chrysos Heirs... Of course, this is just one of many popular folktales.

t_ch: 请别把它当成不可理喻的迷信，世人都经历了从怀疑到笃信的转变，而且那转变来得并不容易，许多人都为之付出了代价。
t_en: Please don't simply dismiss it as silly superstition. The people of this world have already experienced the transition from skepticism to firm belief, and this transition wasn't easy to achieve. Many have paid the price.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅传达给我们的，更多是一种集体的使命。但你作为个人，白厄，又在其中扮演了什么角色？
t_en: What Aglaea conveyed to us was more of a collective mission. As an individual, what role do you play in all of this, Phainon?

t_ch: 我吗？我还在寻找那个答案。
t_en: Me? I'm still seeking that answer myself.

t_ch: 但如果诸神眷顾，<color=#dbc291ff>属于我的火种</color>应该已经不远了。
t_en: But if the gods favor me, I believe that <color=#dbc291ff>my Coreflame</color> won't be far.

t_ch: 是尼卡多利？
t_en: Is it Nikador?

t_ch: 属于你的火种？
t_en: Your Coreflame?

t_ch: 是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: It's {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 我是一名士兵，从小就被教导如何战斗。从被预言选中的那一天起，我便把{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}视作自己的终点。
t_en: I'm a soldier who was taught how to fight at a young age. From the day I was selected by the prophecy, I've regarded {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}the Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} as my goal.

t_ch: 总有一天，我会折断它的长矛，摘下「纷争」的火种。
t_en: One day, I'll break the lance and take the Coreflame of Strife.

t_ch: …不过，一直讨论这么苦大仇深的话题也属实扫兴。好像还是我起的头，真难为情。
t_en: ...But discussing such a bitter topic is a bummer. I'm embarrassed since I think I'm the one who brought it up.

t_ch: 对了，缇宝老师说你们也用石版，不如咱们交换个联络符吧？还有这些谢礼，也请一并收下。
t_en: Oh right, Tribbie mentioned that you two also use teleslates. Why don't we exchange contacts? Please also accept these gifts as a token of my appreciation.

t_ch: 趁着天色正好，两位不如多走走看看吧。不打扰你们，回头见了。
t_en: Since the weather is great, why don't you two look around some more? I won't take up more of your time. See you later.

t_ch: 你的枪，并不严重，损伤。已经完成了，修复。
t_en: Your spear, not too serious, the damage. Has been completed, the repair.

t_ch: 啊…是两位贵客。
t_en: Ah... It's our two distinguished guests.

t_ch: 欢迎来到大地兽的居所…虽然这么说，但我也只是刚好路过。
t_en: Welcome to the dwelling of the dromases... Well, I'm also just passing by.

t_ch: 空气不怎么清新啊…
t_en: The air here isn't too fresh...

t_ch: 会吗？我觉得很甜蜜…是生命的香气。
t_en: Really? I find it rather sweet... It's the fragrance of life.

t_ch: 你也是来散心的？
t_en: You're also here to unwind?

t_ch: 嗯。我喜欢这里的气息。很甜蜜…有生命的香气。
t_en: Yes. I enjoy the air here. It's rather sweet... Full of the fragrance of life.

t_ch: 说起来，遐蝶小姐也是黄金裔吗？
t_en: Speaking of which, is Miss Castorice also a Chrysos Heir?

t_ch: 是。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: …抱歉，如果你不想聊这个话题，我会就此打住。
t_en: ...My apologies. If you don't wish to talk about this topic, I'll stop myself here.

t_ch: 谢谢，丹恒先生。
t_en: Thank you, Mr. Dan Heng.

t_ch: 我来给你们跳一段吧。
t_en: Should I show off my dance moves?

t_ch: …倒也不必，除非你想帮倒忙。
t_en: ...No, thank you. Unless you wish to make things worse.

t_ch: （指着大地兽）活跃一下气氛！
t_en: (point at the dromas) Let's liven up the atmosphere!

t_ch: …它好像听懂了，只是懒得理你。
t_en: ...It seems to have understood you, but it's choosing to ignore you.

t_ch: （保持沉默。）
t_en: (Remain silent.)

t_ch: …嗡嗡！
t_en: ...Grumph!

t_ch: 呀，看来这孩子有些饿了。
t_en: Oh, this child looks hungry.

t_ch: 两位来得正巧，要试试给大地兽喂食吗？
t_en: Since you are here, do you two want to try feeding the dromases?

t_ch: 初次喂食，只拿一小块就好。
t_en: Since it's your first time feeding, just a small piece will do.

t_ch: 我能尝尝吗？
t_en: Can I have a taste?

t_ch: 当然可以。但味道很苦，也不容易消化。
t_en: Of course, but it's very bitter and hard to digest.

t_ch: …她认真的语气当场打消了你狂野的点子。
t_en: ...Her serious tone immediately quashes your wild idea.

t_ch: 拿取干燥的红土结晶。
t_en: Grab the crystallized dry redsoil.

t_ch: 你轻轻地从容器中拿起一块红土，大地兽用殷切的眼神观察着你的一举一动…可别搞砸了。
t_en: You gently pick up a piece of red clay from the container, while the dromas watches your every move intently... Don't mess it up.

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡……
t_en: Grumph...

t_ch: 大地兽发出迟缓但愉悦的叫声，显然，它在期待着你这位新人饲养员的表现。
t_en: The dromas lets out a slow but joyful sound, clearly anticipating your performance as its new caretaker.

t_ch: 要让它如此轻易就得到想要的东西吗？还是……
t_en: Should it get what it wants so easily, or...?

t_ch: 将红土饲料喂给大地兽。
t_en: Offer the redsoil feed to the dromas.

t_ch: 当着大地兽的面吃掉饲料。
t_en: Eat the feed in front of the dromas.

t_ch: 你直勾勾地盯着手中的红色土块，然后又抬头确认了一下大地兽的眼神。
t_en: You stare intently at the red clay in your hand, then look up to check the dromas' expression.

t_ch: …嗡嗡？
t_en: ...Grumph?

t_ch: 你看到了疑惑…犹豫…好像还有一丝隐匿的挑衅。大家伙俯视着你，仿佛在说：「你有胆吗，小家伙？」
t_en: You see confusion... hesitation... and perhaps a hint of hidden defiance. The big guy looks down at you, as if to say, "Do you have the guts, little one?"

t_ch: 你从小到大——虽然也算不上多久的时间——还从来没有被一只动物看扁过。现在，恐怕只有一个办法可以保住你的尊严……
t_en: You've never been underestimated by an animal in your life — though your life hasn't been that long. Now, there's probably only one way to save your dignity...

t_ch: 你一口咬掉了红色立方体的一角。在你身边，亲眼目睹这一幕发生的两名观众发出了难以置信的声音。
t_en: You take a bite from the red cube. Next to you, the two spectators who witness this gasp in disbelief.
*wince*
Ah...

t_ch: 遐蝶没有骗你，这红土块的味道确实相当…苦涩。这种苦涩不同于任何烈性药物，它直击你心灵的绵软之处，令你开始质疑「开拓」的意义。
t_en: Castorice wasn't lying. The taste of this red clay is truly... bitter. It's a bitterness unlike any medicine. It strikes the softest part of your soul, making you question the very meaning of "Trailblazing."

t_ch: 出乎你的意料，它并不坚硬，但这未必是一件好事——咀嚼了几下之后，带有粘性的红土碎末全都糊在了你的牙齿上，无论如何用舌头搜刮都无法将它清理干净。
t_en: Surprisingly, it isn't hard, but that's not necessarily a good thing. After chewing it a few times, the sticky flecks of redsoil stain your teeth. No matter how you use your tongue, you can't get rid of it.

t_ch: …喝口水吧。
t_en: ...Drink some water.

t_ch: 你将净水含在口中，奋力洗刷口腔内残留的黏土，但这份苦涩却难以被轻易冲漱……
t_en: You hold the clean water in your mouth, trying hard to rinse away the remaining clay, but the bitterness lingers stubbornly...

t_ch: 嗡嗡嗡呜……
t_en: Grumphhh...

t_ch: 大地兽发出了嘲弄的叫声。这下你不仅收获了它的嘲笑，而且还得继续担起投喂它的职责……
t_en: The dromas lets out a mocking cry. Now, you've not only earned its ridicule, but also the ongoing duty of feeding it...

t_ch: 哈哈……
t_en: Haha...

t_ch: 看来发生了些意外呢。没关系，饲料还有很多…再去拿一块吧。
t_en: That was a little unexpected. Don't worry. There's a lot more feed over there. Just go get another piece.

t_ch: 让丹恒吃掉饲料。
t_en: Offer the feed to Dan Heng.

t_ch: …想都别想。
t_en: ...That's not going to happen.

t_ch: 该死，他什么时候学会的读心术？
t_en: Darn it, when did he learn to read minds?

t_ch: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumph... Grumphhh!

t_ch: 呜呜嗡嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumphhhh... Grumphhh!

t_ch: 眼前的大家伙发出了满意的叫声。
t_en: The big guy in front lets out a satisfied sound.

t_ch: 你不知道它是如何嚼碎并消化这些土块的——但在它们眼里，这些硬邦邦的红土一定和刚刚煎好的、滋滋冒油的肉排一样鲜美。
t_en: You don't know how it chews and digests these clumps of clay — but to them, these hard red clays must be as delicious as a freshly sizzling steak.

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumphhh!

t_ch: 它好像很开心。或许…你可以试着摸摸它？
t_en: It looks very happy. Perhaps... you could try petting it?

t_ch: 轻轻地触摸它的脑袋。
t_en: Gently pat it on the head.

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡…嗡嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumphhh... Grumphhh!

t_ch: 用力地揉搓它的脖子。
t_en: Rub its neck with some strength.

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡…嗡嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumphhh... Grumphhh!

t_ch: 看来它很喜欢这样。你和大地兽很投缘呢。
t_en: It seems to enjoy it a lot. You get along very well with the dromas.

t_ch: 真教人羡慕呀。
t_en: It makes me envious.

t_ch: 你不来摸摸看吗？
t_en: Don't you want to try petting it as well?

t_ch: 它也会喜欢你的。
t_en: It will also like you.

t_ch: 我吗？我就不必了，没关系……
t_en: Me? No, thanks. It's alright...

t_ch: 遐蝶小姐是有什么顾虑么？我们初来乍到，希望能用实际行动拉近与各位的距离。
t_en: Miss Castorice, are you concerned about something? Since we've just arrived in this area, we hope to build closer relationships with everyone through our actions.

t_ch: 两位误会了。你们出手帮助奥赫玛，已经充分表达了善意。我只是……
t_en: Please don't misunderstand. When you helped Okhema, you already showed ample goodwill. It's just that I...

t_ch: …不怎么擅长「接触」而已。无论是和人，还是和这些孩子。
t_en: ...am not too good with social "contact." Regardless of whether it's with people or with these children.

t_ch: 请别放在心上。
t_en: So, please don't take it to heart.

t_ch: …好。{NICKNAME}，也拍张大地兽的照片吧。这种神奇的生物别处不多见。
t_en: ...Alright. {NICKNAME}, take a photo of the dromas as well. It's rare to encounter such an amazing creature.

t_ch: 两位是想和这孩子合影吗？那样的话，我或许能帮上忙。
t_en: Would you two like a photo with this child? In that case, I might be able to help.

t_ch: 你喜欢拍照？
t_en: Do you enjoy taking photos?

t_ch: 嗯，留影算是我的兴趣。
t_en: Yes, it is an interest of mine.

t_ch: 倒也不用勉强自己。
t_en: You don't have to force yourself.

t_ch: 不是勉强。留影算是我的兴趣。
t_en: That's not it. Photography is an interest of mine.

t_ch: 这样也好，麻烦你了。
t_en: Alright then. Thanks for your help.

t_ch: 不麻烦。请把留影石机放在地上。
t_en: No problem. Please place the photostone on the ground.

t_ch: 放在地上？
t_en: On the ground?

t_ch: 不能直接给你吗？
t_en: Can't I just hand it to you?

t_ch: …先照她说的做吧。
t_en: ...Let's just do as she says.

t_ch: 你将三月七的相机放在了地上，遐蝶弯腰将它拾起……
t_en: You put March 7th's camera on the ground, and Castorice bends down to pick it up...

t_ch: 很漂亮的颜色呢，感觉…非常可爱。
t_en: What beautiful colors. It's... very cute.

t_ch: 光圈、感光度、还有预设的滤镜…虽然外观不同，但实际构造是一样的。没问题。
t_en: The aperture, exposure index, and preset filter... Although it looks different on the outside, it actually has the same internal structure. There won't be any issues.

t_ch: 两位，请站好位置。
t_en: Alright, get into position.

t_ch: 这样就好啦。希望二位喜欢。
t_en: And we're done. I hope that you like it.

t_ch: 遐蝶轻轻地把相机放在地上，你俯身将其捡起。
t_en: Castorice gently places the camera on the ground, and you bend down to pick it up.

t_ch: 这…你太谦虚了，遐蝶小姐。简直无可挑剔。
t_en: This... You're too humble, Miss Castorice. It's perfect.

t_ch: 爱好者和专家的差距…
t_en: This is the difference between hobbyists and professionals...

t_ch: 只有三月能和她抗衡…
t_en: March is probably the only one on the same level...

t_ch: …只是，用黑白滤镜是有什么考量吗？
t_en: ...But, what's the reason behind using the black and white filter?

t_ch: 啊…抱歉，只是个人爱好，我喜欢黑白的照片。如果两位介意，我再重拍一张。
t_en: Ah... My apologies, it's just personal preference. I like black and white photos. If it bothers you, I can take another photo.

t_ch: 不必了。这样就好。
t_en: That won't be necessary. This is fine.

t_ch: 很高兴能帮上忙。
t_en: I'm glad that I could help.

t_ch: 那我先失陪了。两位请继续和大地兽玩耍吧。
t_en: Then, I'll take my leave now. Please continue playing with the dromases.

t_ch: 总觉得有些奇怪…
t_en: That was a little strange...

t_ch: 该说是寡言少语吗？也不对，只是有些捉摸不透。
t_en: You could say she's not very talkative? No, that's not it, she's just a little elusive.

t_ch: 好神秘的一位小姐…
t_en: What a mysterious lady...

t_ch: 该说是寡言少语吗？也不对，只是有些捉摸不透。
t_en: You could say she's not very talkative? No, that's not it, she's just a little elusive.

t_ch: 「剧本」里还安排了摄影师平替？
t_en: There's even a stand-in photographer in the "script"?

t_ch: …这话听着像星核猎手的台词。
t_en: ...Why are you speaking like a Stellaron Hunter all of a sudden?

t_ch: 那位遐蝶小姐，该说是寡言少语吗？也不对，只是有些捉摸不透。
t_en: You could say Miss Castorice is not very talkative? No, that's not it, she's just a little elusive.

t_ch: 先前遇见时也是，她似乎很避讳和人产生肢体接触……
t_en: Even when we came across her previously, she avoided having physical contact with others...

t_ch: 这些黄金裔个个都性格迥异，相较之下，白厄大抵是最正常的那个了。
t_en: These Chrysos Heirs all have wildly different personalities. In comparison, Phainon seems like the most normal one.

t_ch: 要回云石天宫么？还是在下边多逛一会儿，你来决定吧。
t_en: Should we return to Marmoreal Palace? Or do you want to wander around for a bit more?

t_ch: 壁画以简约而细腻的雕工记载了{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}创生、奥赫玛建城的故事。
t_en: The murals record in simple and delicate carvings the stories of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} creating life and building Okhema.

t_ch: 在壁画中，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}背负着庞大的黎明机器，它的身上流着金色的神血，自左胸一直垂落至大地，向四面八方淌去。
t_en: In the murals, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} bears the enormous Dawn Device on their back. Golden divine blood courses across their body, flowing to the ground from the left-hand side of their chest and spreading in all directions.

t_ch: 在它的脚下，沐浴金血的人类们合力修建起一座宏伟的城邦。这就是奥赫玛，翁法罗斯文明的发源地。
t_en: At their feet, the humans bathed in the golden blood work together to create a great city. This city is Okhema, the origin of Amphoreus civilization.

t_ch: …昼与夜的争忿，诞出全知巨人。双足丈量世界，背脊担负晨昏。
t_en: ...The strife of day and night birthed the all-knowing giant. Their feet measure the earth and their back carries the dawn and dusk.

t_ch: 它以夜作帷，一路长梦至醒，方知：我之无缺啊，是为创生而生。
t_en: With the night as their curtain, they dreamt until they awoke. Only then did they realize: My perfection was born for creation.

t_ch: 众神啊，请聆听我愿：
t_en: Gods, please hear my wish:

t_ch: 以新土抟我形貌，以硕果赋予智慧。以蝶翎点亮情思，以金血浇铸命运。
t_en: Craft my likeness with fresh earth, and grant my intellect with your fruits. Illuminate my emotions with the wings of a butterfly and forge my fate with golden blood.

t_ch: 完美的神造出最初之人，最初之人砌成最初之城。
t_en: The perfect gods created the very first humans, and the first humans created the first city.

t_ch: 奥赫玛唷！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}全世之座{RUBY_E#}足下，金血溯流之始。
t_en: Okhema! Standing at the foot of the {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Throne of Worlds{RUBY_E#}, your golden blood can be traced back to the very beginning.

t_ch: 纵然黑潮淹没旧土，圣城终能渡往新世……
t_en: Though the black tide devours the ancient lands, the holy city will cross over to a new world...

t_ch: 老人家，您这东西是新的！而且是纯新，毫无争议的新。
t_en: Ma'am, this item of yours is new! Completely new! There's no doubt about it.

t_ch: 不、不可能！这可是我祖上传下来的宝贝…西塔罗斯呢？让他来给我看看！
t_en: T—That's impossible! This is an heirloom that's been passed down by my ancestors... Where's Theodoros? Get him over here to take a look!

t_ch: 哎，我做古宝鉴定的经验虽然远不及先生，但这点自信还是有的。您要是信不过我，可以再拿它去别家看看。
t_en: Although I'm not as experienced at doing appraisals as he is, I'm very confident about this. If you don't trust me, you can take it elsewhere for a second opinion.

t_ch: 或者，我可以现场给您烧一下——您只要闻着味道就能分辨出来了！
t_en: Or, I can burn it for you? You'll be able to tell once you smell it!

t_ch: 不，不行！不许烧我的传家宝贝！
t_en: N—No way! You can't burn my family heirloom!

t_ch: 没想到白厄还有这种爱好……
t_en: I never thought that Phainon had such a hobby...

t_ch: 他遇到的人好像很难缠，还是先别打扰了。
t_en: He seems to be dealing with someone difficult right now. Let's leave him to it.

t_ch: 他遇到的人好像很难缠，还是先别打扰了。
t_en: He seems to be dealing with someone difficult right now. Let's leave him to it.

t_ch: 嘿，你在<color=#dbc291ff>辩论场</color>里吗？
t_en: Hey, are you in the <color=#dbc291ff>forum</color>?

t_ch: 辩论场？你说哪个？
t_en: Forum? Which one?

t_ch: 就是那个——<color=#dbc291ff>「粉霞天女」</color>——热烈程度还在一路飙升呢！我看你不在里边，先进来吧，不然人要坐满了。
t_en: The one about the <color=#dbc291ff>Rosy Celestial Maiden</color>. Its getting more popular by the minute! I don't see you in there yet. Hurry up! It's filling up quickly.

t_ch: 粉霞天女、辩论场……
t_en: Rosy Celestial Maiden, forum...

t_ch: 哪有人在辩论啊？
t_en: Who's debating what?

t_ch: 搞得我也有点好奇。
t_en: I'm starting to get a little curious too.

t_ch: 总有种微妙的预感，不会是我想的那样吧…过去看一眼。
t_en: I have a strange feeling about this. I hope that it's not what I think it is... Let's go take a look.

t_ch: 两位，打扰了。我们不是故意偷听，但你们方才提到的辩论场…我们也想了解一下。
t_en: Excuse me, we accidentally overheard something about a forum just now... We would like to find out more.

t_ch: 嗯？你们这身打扮，到底是……
t_en: Hmm? Your outfits, who exactly...

t_ch: 我们是异邦来的战士，此前参与了奥赫玛保卫战。
t_en: We're warriors from a foreign land who assisted in the defense of Okhema.

t_ch: 原来是两位勇士，失敬失敬！没想到你们也会对社会逸闻感兴趣，当然没问题。
t_en: Ah, brave warriors, pardon me! I didn't expect you to be interested in such social affairs, but sure thing.

t_ch: 请两位拿出石版，我来教你们连入奥赫玛的<color=#dbc291ff>万帷网</color>。
t_en: Please take out your teleslate. I'll help you connect to Okhema's <color=#dbc291ff>World Wound Web</color>.

t_ch: 原来是「讨论组」啊！
t_en: Oh, it's actually an online discussion forum!

t_ch: 我就知道…
t_en: I knew it...

t_ch: 搞定——二位请看！
t_en: Got it! Please take a look!

t_ch: ——糟了！
t_en: Oh no!

t_ch: 那个给我们拍照的达米亚诺斯…一定是他。他当时点开了相册，看见了三月七以前拍的照片。
t_en: That Damionis guy who took a photo for us... It must be him! He must have opened the album and saw the photos that March 7th previously took.

t_ch: 这人办事太不地道！
t_en: How sneaky of him!

t_ch: 这下三月七成天女了。
t_en: March 7th has now become a celestial maiden.

t_ch: 这不是重点。
t_en: That's beside the point.

t_ch: 会场里有一百多个人，虽然目前没人相信达米亚诺斯，但我们不知道他接下来会做什么。一旦事情失去控制，后果难以想象。
t_en: There are more than a hundred people in here. Although no one believes what Damionis is saying now, we don't know what he'll do next. If the situation gets out of control, the consequences might be disastrous.

t_ch: 希望黄金裔没空冲浪…
t_en: I hope that the Chrysos Heirs are too busy to surf the web.

t_ch: 社交平台，人类最大的敌人…
t_en: Mankind's greatest enemy, social media...

t_ch: 快！在事态发酵前，必须找到本人。
t_en: Quick! We have to find Damionis before things get worse.

t_ch: 粉霞天女，喔…你是来自天上的恩赐，太阳的女儿~
t_en: Oh, Rosy Celestial Maiden... You truly are a gift from the heavens, a daughter of the sun!

t_ch: {RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}也无法囚禁你。你会温柔地凿开天空吗？只为把我们带离这黑暗长夜……
t_en: Even {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} cannot restrain you. Will you gently carve open the sky? If only to lead us out of this long dark night...

t_ch: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
t_en: Have you seen Damionis?

t_ch: 她不怎么温柔。
t_en: She's not that gentle.
...Hey.

t_ch: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
t_en: Have you seen Damionis?

t_ch: 谁？不，我不在乎什么达米亚诺斯。现在……
t_en: Who? No. I do not care about any Damionis. Right now...

t_ch: …我心里只有美丽的幻想和诗歌！喔，粉霞天女，奥赫玛的明光……
t_en: ...I only have beautiful fantasies and poems in my heart! Oh, Rosy Celestial Maiden, the light of Okhema...

t_ch: …下一个。
t_en: ...Next.

t_ch: 粉霞天女，只从这字里行间，我便能想象你的美貌！你定然是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的化身，令我深陷池沼，难以自拔……
t_en: Rosy Celestial Maiden, just from this name alone am I able to imagine your beauty! You must be the incarnation of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}. You cause me to sink deeper and deeper, unable to get a hold of myself...

t_ch: 美丽的天女，我该如何才能赢得你的芳心？
t_en: Oh, beautiful celestial maiden, how can I ever win your affection?

t_ch: 零食，毛绒玩具，可爱的衣服。
t_en: With snacks, plushies, and cute clothes.

t_ch: …你眼中的三月七还真单纯。
t_en: ... Is March 7th really that simple in your eyes?

t_ch: 快问正事。
t_en: Let's get to the point.

t_ch: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
t_en: Have you seen Damionis?

t_ch: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
t_en: Have you seen Damionis?

t_ch: 打咩阿斯？阿米诺斯？不，我不知道你在说什么，朋友……
t_en: Dameas? Aminos? No, I don't know what you're talking about, friend...

t_ch: 现在，我心中只有粉霞天女！
t_en: Right now, I only have the Rosy Celestial Maiden in my heart!

t_ch: 不知道他喝了什么，该有人来劝劝他了。
t_en: Wonder what he drank. Someone should come calm him down.

t_ch: 走吧，再去别处看看。
t_en: Let's go and look elsewhere.

t_ch: 诸位公民，请停止传播来历不明的形象！
t_en: Dear citizens, please stop spreading images of unknown origins!

t_ch: 你们还未清醒吗？粉霞天女是被编造的谎言，是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的恶作剧。我们应当追随阿格莱雅女士的领导，而非沉浸在消磨意志的幻想里……
t_en: Please wake up! The Rosy Celestial Maiden is a lie crafted by {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} as a prank. We should follow the lead of Lady Aglaea and not subject ourselves to such mind-numbing fantasies...

t_ch: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
t_en: Have you seen Damionis?

t_ch: 倒也不是谎言…
t_en: It's not exactly a lie...

t_ch: 别惹麻烦。
t_en: Don't stir up trouble.

t_ch: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
t_en: Have you seen Damionis?

t_ch: 达米亚诺斯？那个自命不凡的探险家？
t_en: Damionis? That explorer who thinks very highly of himself?

t_ch: 我听过这个名字，但从未见过其人。只听他人评价，他必定是个十足的疯——
t_en: I've heard of him but have never met him in person. Others have said that he's completely crazy—

t_ch: <size=28>粉霞天女！天外之界——！！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Rosy Celestial Maiden! A world beyond the sky!</size>

t_ch: 什么声音？
t_en: What's that commotion?

t_ch: 公民！冷静，别做傻事！
t_en: Citizen! Calm down. Don't do anything foolish!

t_ch: 这里可是生命花园，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}「裂分之枝」{RUBY_E#}的圣地！你要亵渎神明吗？
t_en: This is the Garden of Life, the holy ground of the {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Bough of Rift{RUBY_E#}! Are you trying to defile the gods?

t_ch: 亵渎？你们大错特错！睿智的{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}会为我感到骄傲的，看着吧！
t_en: Defile the gods? No, you guys are completely wrong! The wise {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} will be proud of me. Just watch!

t_ch: 他到底想干嘛？我们走近些看看。
t_en: What is he trying to do? Let's get closer and take a look.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}承诺的智慧理应平等地属于每一个人。
t_en: The wisdom of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} should be shared equally by all.

t_ch: 我，探险家达米亚诺斯，今天便要插上羽翼，触摸天空——向所有人证明天外之界的存在！
t_en: I, Explorer Damionis, shall put on these wings today and touch the sky — proving to everyone that a world beyond the sky exists!

t_ch: …羽翼？
t_en: ...Wings?

t_ch: 没错——就在此处！
t_en: That's right — right here, right now!

t_ch: 这就是个大号的「飞天坛递」，你是在自寻死路！
t_en: That is a giant Flying Amphora. You're going to fall to your death!

t_ch: 呵，尽情释放你们的讥讽吧。我会以实践为盾，折断你们质疑的矛！
t_en: Heh, ridicule me all you want. I shall prove myself and remove all doubts!

t_ch: 感觉他死定了。
t_en: I think he's going to die.

t_ch: 真的能成功吗？
t_en: Do you think he will succeed?

t_ch: 显然做不到。
t_en: Obviously not.

t_ch: 不能见死不救，我们上。
t_en: We can't stand by and watch him die. Let's go.

t_ch: 二位是…阿格莱雅大人的贵客？
t_en: You two are... the distinguished guests of Lady Aglaea?

t_ch: 达米亚诺斯先生，请你冷静下来，不要冲动。
t_en: Mr. Damionis, please calm down. Don't act rashly.

t_ch: …两位朋友，你们不愿透露实情，背后一定有自己的苦衷，我不会刁难。
t_en: ...My dear friends, I know that you must have your own reasons to hide the truth. I shall not make things difficult for you.

t_ch: 但谢谢你们，为我展示了天外的画卷。此刻，我就要去完成这项震古烁今的伟大事业——达米亚诺斯决不食言！
t_en: But thank you for showing me the image from beyond the sky. Now, I shall embark on this earthshaking undertaking — Damionis always follows through on his words!

t_ch: 我们信你，我们信你！
t_en: We believe you, we really do!

t_ch: 你真的误会了…
t_en: You've really misunderstood...

t_ch: 省去挽留的言辞吧，我去意已决。
t_en: Save your words of persuasion. I've made up my mind.

t_ch: 安抚不起作用，必须换个策略谈判了。
t_en: Since appeasing him did not work, it's time for a change in strategy.

t_ch: 你的努力毫无意义！
t_en: Your efforts are meaningless!

t_ch: 哈哈，语气出卖了你，朋友！我明白，你想用尽一切办法挽留我——
t_en: Haha, my friend, your tone has betrayed you! I understand that you're trying to persuade me to stay...

t_ch: 没有人会记得你！
t_en: No one will remember you!

t_ch: 哈哈，想激怒我，用情绪淹没使命？可惜我看穿了你的用意，你想用尽一切办法挽留我——
t_en: Haha, trying to enrage me in hopes that my emotions will overwhelm my mission? It's... It's a pity that I've seen through your intentions. You're... You're trying to persuade me to stay...

t_ch: 既聪明又愚蠢，形容的就是这种人吧？
t_en: A clever fool. That's how to describe people like him, right?

t_ch: 我都快被他的执着打动了……
t_en: I'm almost moved by his persistence...

t_ch: 不必再多费口舌了——{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}，接下我的怒火吧！
t_en: Save your words. {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, feel my wrath!

t_ch: 要来不及了……
t_en: We're running out of time...

t_ch: 怎么办，丹恒？！
t_en: Dan Heng, what should we do!?

t_ch: 再不行动的话……
t_en: If we don't take action...

t_ch: 这是一条生命！没办法了，告诉他吧……
t_en: It's a human life after all! There's no choice. Let's just tell him...

t_ch: 达米亚诺斯——
t_en: Damionis...

t_ch: 你想的没错——
t_en: You're right...

t_ch: ——「天外世界」真的存在！
t_en: A world beyond the sky really exists!

t_ch: 你们…刚才说了什么？
t_en: What... did you just say?

t_ch: 所以…我是对的？你们真的…来自天外？
t_en: So... I was right? You really are from... beyond the sky?

t_ch: …我们有约定在身，不能向你道出真相。
t_en: ...We are bound by a pact. I cannot reveal the truth to you.

t_ch: 约定？啊，怪不得他叫你们「阿格莱雅的贵客」……
t_en: A pact? Ah, so that's why he called you "distinguished guests of Aglaea"...

t_ch: ——达米亚诺斯！跟我们回去接受审讯吧！
t_en: Damionis! We're taking you in for an interrogation!

t_ch: 唉，这下麻烦了。
t_en: This is not going to go well.

t_ch: 达米亚诺斯会怎样？
t_en: What will happen to Damionis?

t_ch: 他知道了不该知道的事，只能交由阿格莱雅大人裁断了。
t_en: He learned something that he should never have learned. We can only hand him over to Lady Aglaea for judgment.

t_ch: 比起他的安危，二位还是先考虑下流言的影响吧。虽然没人相信达米亚诺斯口中的天外之界，但粉霞天女已经传得到处都是了。
t_en: Instead of worrying about his safety, perhaps you guys should worry about the impact of the rumors. Although no one believes what Damionis said about a world beyond the sky, the Rosy Celestial Maiden has already spread everywhere.

t_ch: …抱歉，给各位添麻烦了。
t_en: ...We're sorry for the trouble that we caused.

t_ch: 没关系，眼下只有一个办法：你们可以去找<color=#dbc291ff>真言狮口</color>，给它讲些更有趣的传闻，兴许可以盖过这波浪潮。
t_en: It's alright. I think there's only one thing you can do right now. Go to <color=#dbc291ff>Verax Leo</color> and share something even more interesting with him. That way, there's a chance that you can cover up the rumors.

t_ch: 至于这里发生的事…我们不会告诉他人的。快去吧，两位英雄。
t_en: As for what happened earlier... We won't tell anyone else about it. So, go now, brave heroes.

t_ch: 对他使用钟表把戏吧！
t_en: Use the clockwork tricks on him!

t_ch: 钟表小子没有反应。
t_en: Clockie doesn't react.

t_ch: 想用匹诺康尼的剑斩翁法罗斯的官？哈，你想多了。
t_en: You think you can use a Penaconian key to open an Amphorean lock? Ha, that's wishful thinking!

t_ch: 这是什么？看上去像是匹诺康尼的服装店里才会有的人台。
t_en: What's this? It looks like one of those mannequins in the clothing stores of Penacony.

t_ch: 上面还有一只…蝴蝶？是装饰物吗？
t_en: There's also a... butterfly? Is that a fashion accessory?

t_ch: …真是神奇。
t_en: ...How intriguing.

t_ch: 下次再见到这些「若虫」，就把它们收集起来吧…说不定能借助它们进一步了解翁法罗斯。
t_en: We should catch these nymphs the next time we encounter them... Perhaps they can help us better understand Amphoreus.

t_ch: 那是，缇宝的姐妹……
t_en: Isn't that Tribbie's sister...

t_ch: 哎呀，这不是缇宁女士吗？真罕见，您居然会离开智慧花园。
t_en: Gosh, isn't this Lady Trinnon? How rare that you would leave the Garden of Wisdom.

t_ch: 嗯…下来散散心。
t_en: Yeah... I came out to clear my mind.

t_ch: 那您可来对地方了！看，我这儿刚进了些小零食，都是您和您的姐妹们最喜欢的口味！
t_en: Then you've come to the right place! Look at all these snacks that I've just gotten. They are all flavors that you and your sisters love!

t_ch: 缇安大人最爱的酸瓜糖，缇宝大人最爱的黄油饼干，还有您最中意的葡萄叶包饭，应有尽有呀！
t_en: Lady Trianne's favorite sour melon candies, Lady Tribbie's favorite butter cookies, and your favorite stuffed grape leaves. We have everything!

t_ch: 唔，的确很诱人……
t_en: Oh, that's indeed tempting...

t_ch: 还没解决粉霞天女的问题…先避开黄金裔吧。
t_en: Since we haven't solved the Rosy Celestial Maiden problem yet... Let's avoid the Chrysos Heirs for now.

t_ch: 还没解决粉霞天女的问题…先避开黄金裔吧。
t_en: Since we haven't solved the Rosy Celestial Maiden problem yet... Let's avoid the Chrysos Heirs for now.

t_ch: 两位阁下，黎明、清晨、正午好！
t_en: Dear customers, good early morning, late morning, noon!

t_ch: 要来看看我手里的商品吗？瞧瞧，刚好有一幅热乎的画作——《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》！
t_en: Would you like to check out my merch? Look, I have this very popular artwork — {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden!

t_ch: 这就有二创了？！
t_en: There's fan art already!?

t_ch: 这些画家的速度真是惊人…和外面没什么不同。
t_en: The speed of the artists here is just as astonishing as everywhere else...

t_ch: 这和三月七有半点关系吗…
t_en: Is this even remotely related to March 7th...

t_ch: 把名字改成《三月梦中的自己》…好像也不是不行。
t_en: It'll probably work if we change the title to How March Sees Herself in Her Dreams...

t_ch: 怎么样，阁下，买下来吧？
t_en: What do you think? Are you interested?

t_ch: 我买了（<unbreak>25000</unbreak>信用点）。
t_en: I'll get it (<unbreak>25,000</unbreak> credits).

t_ch: 成交！从现在开始，这幅《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》就是您的私人收藏了！
t_en: Deal! Now, this {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden is yours!

t_ch: 不过，瞧您这么喜欢，不如再看看我手上另一幅作品？它的名字叫《白厄与黑厄》——
t_en: However, since you like this so much, would you like to take a look at another piece that I have? It's titled Phainon and Pie-non.

t_ch: 谢谢，我们不需要。走吧。
t_en: No, thank you. Let's go.

t_ch: 不买。
t_en: No, thanks.

t_ch: 好吧。要是您改主意了，随时找我哈。
t_en: Alright, feel free to look for me at anytime if you change your mind.

t_ch: 如何？您打算购入《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》了吗？
t_en: So, have you decided to purchase {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden?

t_ch: 买下二创作品（<unbreak>25000</unbreak>信用点）。
t_en: Purchase the fan work (<unbreak>25,000</unbreak> credits).

t_ch: 成交！从现在开始，这幅《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》就是您的私人收藏了！
t_en: Deal! Now, this {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden is yours!

t_ch: 不过，瞧您这么喜欢，不如再看看我手上另一幅作品？它的名字叫《白厄与黑厄》——
t_en: However, since you like this so much, would you like to take a look at another piece that I have? It's titled Phainon and Pie-non.

t_ch: 谢谢，我们不需要。走吧。
t_en: No, thank you. Let's go.

t_ch: 不买。
t_en: No, thanks.

t_ch: 好吧。要是您改主意了，随时找我哈。
t_en: Alright, feel free to look for me at anytime if you change your mind.

t_ch: 粉霞天女！快来买啊！
t_en: Rosy Celestial Maiden merch! Come get them right here!

t_ch: 这边的浴池水温…很低。
t_en: The water in this bath... is very cold.

t_ch: 什么人会喜欢泡冷水澡？
t_en: Is there anyone who is fond of cold water baths?

t_ch: 你感兴趣？
t_en: Do you want to go in?

t_ch: 比起热水浴，持明更爱清凉的水流。这是一种…天性。
t_en: Well, actually... the Vidyadhara prefer cooler waters over hot baths. It's our... nature.

t_ch: 有机会你也可以试试，但不是现在，先去找真言狮口吧。
t_en: You can try it out when you get the chance, but now is not the time. Let's go look for Verax Leo first.

t_ch: 这是什么装饰物？面具吗？
t_en: What kind of decoration is this? A mask?

t_ch: 枘凿六合。
t_en: A Hexanexus.

t_ch: 梦境迷钟。
t_en: A Dream Ticker.

t_ch: 哇，新的玩具！
t_en: Wow, a new toy!

t_ch: 感觉这副山羊面具藏着什么玄机…碰一下试试吧。
t_en: It feels like this ram mask is hiding something... Let's try touching it.

t_ch: 这就是真言狮口？居然真的是个狮子…的脑袋？
t_en: This is Verax Leo? It really is a lion's... head?

t_ch: 怎么看都只是一尊雕像，该怎么和它交流？
t_en: No matter how I look at it, it just looks like any other statue. How do we even interact with it?

t_ch: 拿球棍敲一下。
t_en: Whack it with the baseball bat.

t_ch: 就算只是个装饰品，破坏公物也是要赔偿的。
t_en: Even if it's just a decoration, we will still have to pay if we damage public property.

t_ch: 它的嘴张着，也许可以把手伸进去试试？
t_en: Since its mouth is open, perhaps we can try putting our hands in it?

t_ch: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
t_en: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

t_ch: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
t_en: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

t_ch: 吼吼吼！瞧啊，瞧瞧这是谁来拜访本狮了！
t_en: Roarrr! Look who came to visit this mighty lion!

t_ch: 这不是奥赫玛的新朋友，两位远道而来的勇士吗？幸会幸会，吼吼吼！
t_en: Aren't you Okhema's two new friends? The brave warriors from a faraway place? It's an honor to meet you, roarrr!

t_ch: 你的消息似乎很灵通。
t_en: It seems like you're very well-informed.

t_ch: 没人告诉你们吗？本狮可是奥赫玛的千里眼、顺风耳，街头巷尾流传之事，全都逃不过本狮的视听。
t_en: Didn't anyone tell you? I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place.

t_ch: 我们想请你帮个忙。眼下，名为「粉霞天女」的流言正在圣城广为流传……
t_en: We would like to request your help. Currently, rumors regarding the Rosy Celestial Maiden have spread throughout the holy city...

t_ch: 吼吼吼！勇士，这我恐怕爱莫能助啊。
t_en: Roarrr! Brave warriors, I'm afraid that I won't be able to help with that.

t_ch: 流言？我看未必，只要公民们喜欢，真假又有何妨？但二位勇士如此忌讳，背后…莫不是有别的原因？说来听听？
t_en: Rumors? Hah! As long as the citizens like it, who cares about whether it's true or not? However, the way you two are trying to stop it from spreading further... Could there be some other reason? How about sharing it with me?

t_ch: 这可不兴讲啊。
t_en: Sorry, can't do that.

t_ch: 你这狮子怎么吃的是瓜呢？
t_en: Why are you so interested in the tea?

t_ch: 别被它骗了——这狮子最爱的，就是七嘴八舌的热度。
t_en: Don't be fooled by it. This lion loves engaging in gossip and rumors.

t_ch: 就像前几日，有人诋毁我族的荣耀时，你的态度也是放任，不是么？
t_en: A few days ago, when people were besmirching my tribe's honor, didn't you also turn a blind eye?

t_ch: 哦、哦吼、吼吼！这不、这不是万敌阁下嘛！您、您最近可还好啊？
t_en: O—Oh, roarrr! Isn't this Lord Mydei! H—How have you been lately?

t_ch: 长了张狮子的脸，却软弱得像只丧魂的鬣狗。
t_en: The face of a lion but the courage of a soulless hyena.

t_ch: 你跟你的兄弟，为了消遣无所不用其极，连捏造历史这种卑劣的行径都听之任之，毫无底线。
t_en: You and your brothers will do anything for the sake of entertainment, even encouraging despicable acts such as fabricating history. There's no limit to how low you would stoop.

t_ch: 怎、怎么能说是捏造呢？那顶多就是一些…呃…加工！艺术加工！
t_en: H—How can you call that a fabrication? At most, it's just a little... umm... reinterpretation! Artistic reinterpretation!

t_ch: ——闭嘴！
t_en: Shut it!

t_ch: 不能闭，我手还在里面！
t_en: Don't shut it, my hand is still inside!

t_ch: （不抖这个机灵）
t_en: (Don't try to be funny.)

t_ch: 照他们俩说的做，否则…我就徒手将你碾成铁粉。
t_en: Do as they say. Otherwise... I'll turn you into iron dust with my bare hands.

t_ch: 哦吼！我、我知道了，本狮这就去想办法！
t_en: Roar! Y—You got it. I'll fix that right now!

t_ch: 我向各位大人保证，现在开始——你们再也听不见「粉霞天女」这四个字！
t_en: I assure all of you that from now on, you'll no longer hear the words "Rosy Celestial Maiden"!

t_ch: 在真言狮口的「配合」下，流言逐渐平息了……
t_en: With the "cooperation" of the Verax Leo, the rumors gradually die down...

t_ch: 感谢你出手相助。
t_en: Thank you for your help.

t_ch: 别误会，我只是看那狮头不爽。
t_en: Don't misunderstand, I'm just annoyed at that lion head.

t_ch: 以及，白厄似乎很看重你们。要是就这么不明不白地被*清理*了…他那玻璃般脆弱的心脏可受不了。
t_en: Also, Phainon seems to think highly of you guys. If you were to be disposed of for such a trivial reason, his weak and fragile heart might not be able to bear it.

t_ch: 清、清理？
t_en: D—Disposed of?

t_ch: 自求多福吧，异邦人。祈祷这出闹剧还没传到阿格莱雅耳中。
t_en: Pray for the best, outsider. Pray that this farce has not reached the ears of Aglaea.

t_ch: 那位衣着奔放的黄金裔，性格也有些古怪。
t_en: That boldly dressed Chrysos Heir also has an eccentric personality.

t_ch: 但无论如何，此事算是告一段落了。做好心理准备，去赴约吧。
t_en: Regardless, this matter has come to an end. Let's prepare ourselves and head to our appointment.

t_ch: 你们两个，到底干嘛去啦？*我们*在这等了好久，翅膀都扇不动啦。
t_en: Where have the two of you been? We've been waiting here for quite some time. Even our wings are tired.

t_ch: 遇上了一些麻烦，好在解决了。
t_en: We encountered some trouble, but thankfully everything has been resolved.

t_ch: 缇宝老师，你上网吗？
t_en: Tribbie, do you surf the web?

t_ch: 消息很灵通嘛，连万帷网都知道了？年轻人就是有活力！不过今天忙成这样，*我们*哪有空啊。
t_en: Wow, you guys are well-informed. You even know about the World Wound Web? Young people sure are full of energy! But it's been such a busy day, where would we find the time to surf the web?

t_ch: 这样就好。上网…不是什么好习惯。
t_en: That's good. Surfing the web... isn't a good habit to have.

t_ch: 我们真的不是故意的！
t_en: It was really an accident!

t_ch: …什么故意的？
t_en: ...What accident?

t_ch: 咳…没什么，别在意。
t_en: Ahem... It's nothing, don't worry about it.

t_ch: 说什么怪话哪…走吧，但愿阿雅别等得不耐烦了。
t_en: What a strange thing to say... Anyway, let's go. I hope Agy isn't annoyed from waiting too long.

t_ch: 看——万径之门！很显眼吧，*我们*就是在那儿相遇的。
t_en: Look — the Gate of Infinity! It's very eye-catching, isn't it? That's where we met.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的地貌十分壮丽，这里过去一定是个如仙境般美丽的世界。
t_en: The landscape of Amphoreus is breathtaking. In the past, this place must have been a beautiful paradise.

t_ch: 没办法呀。往日无法重现，但*我们*可以追随着神谕向前。
t_en: Ah well, the past cannot be recreated. All we can do is follow the prophecy and move forward.

t_ch: 往日无法重现？可你分明展现过{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神迹。
t_en: The past cannot be recreated? But you clearly showed us {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Miracle before.

t_ch: 这是两个概念。*我们*只是通过祈祷分得{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}「永夜之帷」{RUBY_E#}的力量，从「过往」中打捞必要之物，化为己用。并不是时间倒流哦。
t_en: Those are two different concepts. We can draw upon the power of the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}"Veil of Evernight"{RUBY_E#} through prayer and then salvage necessary items from the past for our own use. It isn't actually reversing time.

t_ch: 尽管如此，也和我们熟知的物理法则背道而驰。
t_en: Even so, it still goes against the laws of physics that we know of.

t_ch: 都有「神」了，还在意这个？
t_en: Is that even surprising, considering that there are also gods in this world?

t_ch: 即便是「神」也要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
t_en: Even gods have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.

t_ch: 我早就想问了…
t_en: I've been meaning to ask that for a while now...

t_ch: 万事万物都要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
t_en: All things have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.

t_ch: 现在先不拍照了。去见阿格莱雅吧。
t_en: We'll take photos later. Let's go and meet Aglaea now.

t_ch: 阿雅，*我们*回来啦。
t_en: Agy, we're back.

t_ch: 辛苦了。缇安有消息了吗？
t_en: Thanks for your hard work. Is there any news from Trianne?

t_ch: 还没呢，但*我们*摸清了那些逃兵的去向。要不了多久，就能追踪到<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>的方位了。
t_en: Not yet. But we've already figured out where the deserters are headed to. With a little more time, we'll be able to track down the location of Castrum Kremnos.

t_ch: 悬锋城…是哪？
t_en: Castrum Kremnos... Where is that?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，也是它如今的居所，一座隐于迷雾的移动城邦。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory and their current abode — it's a moving city-state enveloped in fog.

t_ch: 是万敌提到过的地名。
t_en: Mydei has mentioned this place before.

t_ch: 哦…他对你们如此坦诚？
t_en: Oh... He's that candid with the two of you?

t_ch: 悬锋城是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，也是它如今的居所，一座隐于迷雾的移动城邦。
t_en: Castrum Kremnos, both {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory and their current abode, is a moving city-state enveloped in fog.

t_ch: 原来击退泰坦那时，缇安女士是去追踪敌人了。
t_en: So, back when the Titan was repelled, Lady Trianne was off chasing the enemy.

t_ch: 暂且放下严肃的话题吧。介意给我和两位贵宾留点空间吗，缇宝？
t_en: Let's talk about something less serious for now. Would you mind giving the three of us some space, Tribbie?

t_ch: 当然。希望你们喜欢这份礼物，嘿嘿。
t_en: Of course. Hope you like this gift, heheh.

t_ch: 正如缇宝所说，两位为保卫圣城贡献了许多力量。为此，我想赠予你们一份谢礼。
t_en: As Tribbie mentioned, the both of you spared no effort in protecting the holy city. I would like to present you with a gift in recognition of that.

t_ch: 欢迎来到你们的<color=#dbc291ff>私人浴宫</color>。
t_en: Welcome to your <color=#dbc291ff>private bath chamber</color>.

t_ch: 很豪华啊！
t_en: How fancy!

t_ch: 的确。空间够大，装潢也很华丽。
t_en: Indeed. It's spacious, and the decor is quite impressive.

t_ch: 比匹诺康尼的客房强。
t_en: It's even better than the Penaconian hotel rooms.

t_ch: 很难横向对比，但…空间更大，装潢也很华丽。
t_en: While it's hard to compare them directly, this place... is indeed more spacious, and the decor is quite impressive.

t_ch: 这下乐不思车了。
t_en: I don't want to go back to the Astral Express anymore.

t_ch: 空间够大，装潢也很华丽。
t_en: This place is indeed spacious, and the decor is quite impressive.

t_ch: 两位满意就再好不过。先花些时间，熟悉房间的环境吧。
t_en: I'm glad that you're satisfied with the arrangements. Here, take some time and get to know your surroundings.

t_ch: 房间内的躺椅看上去是如此地舒适诱人，你担心自己一旦躺上去便会彻底失去「开拓」的动力。
t_en: The lounge chair in the room looks so comfy and enticing. You're worried that you'll completely lose the motivation to Trailblaze if you lie on it.

t_ch: 仔细想想，时至如今，你经历的所有波折和苦难——它们有那么值得么？躺在这里，迎来永恒的舒适酣睡，也许那才是你该有的归宿……
t_en: Think about it. All the twists and turns and hardships you've been through... are they worth it? Lying here and welcoming an eternal, comfy slumber... Maybe that's where you belong...
...Ahem.

t_ch: 我知道你在想什么，别被一张躺椅诱惑了。
t_en: I know what you're thinking. Don't be tempted by a mere lounge chair.
Hm...

t_ch: 不试试水温？
t_en: Aren't you going to test the water's temperature?

t_ch: 喜欢吗，小青龙？
t_en: Do you like it, Cold Dragon Young?

t_ch: 丹恒伸出两根手指，探了探浴池的水温。
t_en: Dan Heng dips two fingers into the bath to check the water temperature.

t_ch: 是温水。
t_en: It's lukewarm.

t_ch: 「太好了」——你在心中默念，并努力不让他看出自己的幸灾乐祸。
t_en: "Great," you think silently in your mind, trying hard not to let him see your schadenfreude.

t_ch: 你倚在阳台的石栏边眺望远方，翁法罗斯层叠的山峦被雾气遮蔽，轮廓若隐若现，如同一组在缓慢匍匐与站立之间转变姿态的石之巨人。
t_en: You lean against the stone railing of the balcony, gazing into the distance. The mist-shrouded mountains of Amphoreus appear as vague outlines, like stone giants slowly shifting between crouching and standing.

t_ch: 不知从何处传来了吟游诗人的歌声。你听不清歌谣的辞藻，却依旧从旋律中读到了一丝对往昔的追忆与怀念。
t_en: From somewhere, a bard's song drifts through the air. Though the words are unclear, the melody still conveys a tinge of nostalgia and longing for the past.

t_ch: 这片景色…属实壮观。
t_en: This view is... absolutely breathtaking.

t_ch: 你同意丹恒的说法，非常同意。
t_en: You agree with Dan Heng, very much so.

t_ch: 这是…水盆？看着像是某种仪式用具。
t_en: Is this... a basin? It looks like something used for rituals.

t_ch: 好像在什么电影里见过。
t_en: I feel like I've seen it in a movie before.

t_ch: 好高级的洗脸盆。
t_en: What a premium sink.

t_ch: 小号的入梦池？
t_en: Is this a mini Dreampool?

t_ch: 它并非寻常的盥洗盆，而是黄金裔持有的祭仪器皿，现在由我赠予二位。
t_en: It's not your average washbasin. This ceremonial vessel belonged to the Chrysos Heirs and is now my gift to the both of you.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的历史，还有「圣城」奥赫玛，你们已有所见闻。而现在…对于黄金裔的旅途，我想带两位亲眼见证。
t_en: You have learned, to some extent, about the history of Amphoreus and of the holy city Okhema. Now... I wish for both of you to witness the journey of the Chrysos Heirs for yourselves.

t_ch: 见证…该怎么理解？
t_en: What do you mean by... witness?

t_ch: 上古畴昔，满溢之杯，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}用波涛藏匿起世界的起点。
t_en: In ancient times, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, the Chalice of Plenty, concealed the beginning of the world amidst billowing waves.

t_ch: 古老的「海洋」祭司发现了那里，他们用灵水修建障壁，避免其遭受外物的侵扰，但同时也留下了一条通路。
t_en: When the ancient Ocean Priests discovered that place, they used spirit water to build a barrier in order to prevent the site from being disturbed by external forces. However, they also left behind a passageway.

t_ch: 那便是你们面前的祭仪水盆。消解旁支杂念，以盆中灵水敷面，再次睁开双眼时，你们便能见证……
t_en: That passageway is none other than the ceremonial basin in front of you. Clear yourselves of all distracting thoughts and wash your faces with the spirit water inside the basin. When you next open your eyes, you shall witness for yourselves...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「创世涡心」</color>——寄宿十二泰坦原初神性的伟大圣所，亦是神谕中，创世奇迹降临的应允之地。
t_en: The <color=#dbc291ff>Vortex of Genesis</color>: A great sanctuary that houses the original divinity of the twelve Titans. It's also the place where the prophesized Miracle of Genesis will occur.

t_ch: 迫不及待想看看了…
t_en: I can't wait to see it...

t_ch: 真有那么神奇吗？
t_en: Is it really that amazing?

t_ch: 作为最初的尝试，我来带领你们下潜吧。
t_en: For your first time, I shall personally guide you into the depths.

t_ch: 合上双目，屏住呼吸；隔断听觉，令我的耳语充盈世界。
t_en: Close your eyes and hold your breath. Sever all other sounds and let my whispers fill your ears.

t_ch: 掬一捧清水，将手掌悬于胸前，感受流水从指缝间轻柔流走……
t_en: Take a handful of the pristine water, lift your palms in front of your chest, and feel the water gently flow away through your fingers...

t_ch: 沉下去，再做一次。让灵水浸没你的手腕。熟悉它的温度、触感……
t_en: Sink deeper and do this once more. Submerge your wrists in the spirit water. Familiarize yourself with its temperature, its touch...

t_ch: 分开十指，现在低下头，去找寻你的掌心。感受灵水沿着你的脸颊逆流而上，浸润五官……
t_en: Spread your fingers, then lower your head and search for the palms of your hands. Feel the spirit water flow against your face, until all of your senses are submerged...

t_ch: 漂游、沉没……
t_en: Floating, sinking...

t_ch: 下潜、触底。
t_en: Diving into the depths.

t_ch: 达米亚诺斯若有所思地离开了。
t_en: Damionis left thoughtfully.

t_ch: 离开之前，去看看不知为何聚在一起的市民们吧。
t_en: Before you leave, take a moment to visit the citizens who have somehow managed to gather together.

t_ch: 红土饲料
t_en: Redsoil Feed

t_ch: 将红土饲料喂给大地兽
t_en: Feed the dromas with Redsoil feed

t_ch: 休息片刻
t_en: Take a rest

t_ch: 粉霞天女，奥赫玛的明光……
t_en: Rosy Celestial Maiden, Okhema's light...

t_ch: 美丽的天女，我多想一睹芳容……
t_en: My radiant maiden, how I wish to witness your beauty...
